# Viorel Tudor

> System Architect at Freshful by eMAG (part of Prosus group).
> I design and build distributed infrastructure and AI agent systems
> for a Romanian grocery e-commerce platform.
> Based in Bucharest, Romania.

## Expertise

- AI agents in production: AWS Bedrock AgentCore, Strands SDK, multi-agent orchestration
- E-commerce infrastructure: Symfony/Sylius monolith, Aurora MySQL, RabbitMQ, Valkey, EKS
- Search: AWS OpenSearch hybrid search (BM25 + KNN via RRF), Bedrock Titan v2 embeddings
- Languages and frameworks: PHP/Symfony, Go, Python
- Cloud: AWS (EKS, Bedrock, OpenSearch, Aurora, S3, CloudFront, Route 53)

## Writing

All articles are available at: https://vtudorx.github.io/posts/

Topics covered:
- Building multi-agent systems with AWS Strands SDK and AgentCore in production
- OpenSearch hybrid search with Bedrock embeddings for product catalog
- Distributed systems patterns at e-commerce scale
- System architecture decisions and trade-offs
